_comment: Build ledger for the packaged desktop exe. APP_VERSION (dev/working number) lives in index.html; each /build mints a new buildTag = two random words + -V<buildCount> and appends it to history. On the next /build: increment buildCount, generate two fresh random words, set buildTag, update BUILD_TAG in index.html, then cargo tauri build.

history.note: seam/assembly schema v15 + Seam tool (edge selection)
seam length-mismatch hints + Select-tool 'Part of seam' touchpoint (Step 5)
folds authoring: Seam-tool fold mode + Assembly Folds list/editor (mountain/valley angle)
U6 partial/unequal-length seams: assembly-schema v2 (member t0/t1 sub-span + seam fit/anchor); seam editor Full/Partial + anchor + per-member span %; seamLengthIssues skips partial
card-holder feedback polish: seam-editor labels no longer clipped (.p-fl-w) + readability smoke; partial-seam join drawn as a bold band on the canvas (edgeBandD)

U7 shared stitch across stacked pieces: assembly-schema v3 (seam stitch{shared,spacing}); seamStitchLayout stamps one aligned hole layout on all members (override per-edge); seam-editor 'Stitch as one seam' toggle + Spacing
stitch fixes: shared-stitch holes now inset by the stitch margin (seamStitchLayout + seamShapeCentroid), not on the edge line
mm partial seams (assembly-schema v4): offset+reference-end authoring, auto length = mating edge, true-mm canvas band; paired with 3D v0.0.11

shared-seam end holes one-per-corner: run end holes inset by the margin along the edge (N from inset run) + stitchFor 0.75mm corner dedupe; paired with 3D v0.0.13. Also: dead-code cleanup, .lnk untracked, STYLE_GUIDE re-derived to v0.8.8

UI/UX pass (all 9 audit items + colour-cycling): per-edge stitch toggle list, empty-state invitation, per-tool status hints, unified toolbar SVG icons + Delete removed, shortcut key badges, empty-canvas french-stitch prompt + centred entry view, status-bar hierarchy, Settings menubar gear, Assembly→3D pointer; new shapes cycle the preset palette
